package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for service_method_combines_unrelated_write_paths_via_action_string: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Services that branch on action strings to implement many create, update, or delete variants in one method.
type CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringModel
}

type CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringService struct {
    repo *CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionString(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringDTO) error {
    focus := "service_method_combines_unrelated_write"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    service := &CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringService{repo: &CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    service_method_combines_unrelated_write_positive := map[string]int{"service": 1, "method": 2, "combines": 3, "unrelated": 4, "write": 5, "paths": 6}
    service_method_combines_unrelated_write_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    service_positive_0 := CaseServiceMethodCombinesUnrelatedWritePathsViaActionStringDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_positive_0
    method_positive_1 := service_method_combines_unrelated_write_positive["method"] + len(input)
    _ = method_positive_1
    combines_positive_2 := service_method_combines_unrelated_write_positive["combines"] + len(input)
    _ = combines_positive_2
    unrelated_positive_3 := service_method_combines_unrelated_write_positive["unrelated"] + len(input)
    _ = unrelated_positive_3
    write_positive_4 := service_method_combines_unrelated_write_positive["write"] + len(input)
    _ = write_positive_4
    paths_positive_5 := service_method_combines_unrelated_write_positive["paths"] + len(input)
    _ = paths_positive_5
    return nil
}
